era: 2010-present. Blues Rock. E=7 -- Central District blues, Hendrix lineage, national reach.
associated_musicians: The Black Tones (blues rock pair, degree 249)

theory_nodes.concept: HENDRIX LINEAGE: Central District to Central District. Jimi Hendrix (degrees 245-246) and Ayron Jones (degree 250) both grew up in the Central District of Seattle, both played electric blues-rooted guitar, both represent their era's expression of the same tradition from the same neighborhood. 50+ years apart. Same streets, same instrument, same fundamental music.
theory_nodes.description: Central District blues lineage: Hendrix to Jones.

theory_nodes.concept: 'Mercy' breakthrough: National rock radio play, Hollywood Records major label platform. Jones is the most commercially visible Seattle blues rock musician of his generation. Child of the State (2021) and Suga (2023). The blues tradition on a major label -- raw tradition, contemporary production, national reach.

249-250 blues rock micro-arc: The Black Tones (249, Sub Pop, Rainier Valley, two-piece, raw) + Ayron Jones (250, Hollywood Records, Central District, produced, major label). Two active Seattle blues rock acts in adjacent degrees. The tradition's internal range: stripped vs. polished, indie vs. major, duo vs. solo.
theory_nodes.description: 249-250 as blues rock pair within the engine.

cross_references.relationship: Central District lineage. Same neighborhood, same instrument, same tradition. Hendrix synthesized blues-psychedelia-rock; Jones practices blues rock from the same origin point, 50+ years later.
Adjacent blues rock pair. Rainier Valley vs. Central District. Sub Pop vs. Hollywood Records. Raw two-piece vs. produced major label. Both active. The blues rock micro-arc.
Garage rock follows. Sub Pop. The PNW rock continuum continues beyond the blues arc.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 vs E=5. Multi-harmonic resonance of old-growth fir canopy against blues rock's harmonic directness. Complex physics vs. controlled performance.

milestones: CENTRAL DISTRICT BLUES ARC (245-246 Hendrix → 250 Jones)

discography.title: Child of the State
discography.label: Hollywood Records
discography.note: Major label debut. Blues rock with national reach. Contains 'Mercy.'

discography.title: Suga
discography.label: Hollywood Records
discography.note: Follow-up. Deeper artistic vocabulary. Continued blues rock foundation.

key_track.title: Mercy
key_track.note: Breakthrough single. National rock radio play. Guitar-driven, emotionally direct.
